canonical_definition: A benchmark focused on entity recognition in multilingual multimodal settings, evaluating the model's ability to identify culturally relevant entities from image-text pairs.
papers: LLMs Don’t Know Their Own Decision Boundaries: The Unreliability of Self-Generated Counterfactual Explanations
Principled Personas: Defining and Measuring the Intended Effects of Persona Prompting on Task Performance
